projects.name: tinyGIANT
projects.description: Exclusive fractional advertising & production platform. Invitation-only member collective — best creatives, directors, colorists, editors, engineers, all fractional. Phase 1 MVP shipped (vendor directory, DB, auth, 60 vendors, full client flow). Phase 2: wire Send Brief to real DB, member dashboard, deploy to tgiant.ai.

projects.name: AI Mix Platform (app.studioawesome.ai)
projects.description: End-to-end commercial audio production platform. Phase 1 LIVE at ai-mix-platform.vercel.app. Full workflow: scoping → casting → recording → video upload → AI music/SFX suggestions → AI mix → engineer handoff → versioning → QC delivery. v2 design locked: VO 1 + VO 2 tracks, AI direction layer (Claude with full project context), live engineer button, readability-first UI (16px+, dark charcoal, SA gradient as accent).

projects.name: Select Casting CRM
projects.description: Full CRM replacing Pipedrive ($100/mo → $15/mo). Kanban drag-and-drop board, SC/SA checkboxes per contact, automated email triggers on column moves, Microsoft Graph API email sync (mike@select-casting.com + josiah@studioawesome.la), Calendly webhook for demo bookings, 500 emails/day limit. 1,954 contacts imported to Postgres as of 2026-03-19. Separate logins for Mike (all) and Josiah (SA + shared SC).

projects.name: Mission Control
projects.description: Operating system for Select Casting and Studio Awesome: projects, tasks, leads, tools, calendar, memory, docs, and team. Light theme redesign in progress. Llama-driven auto-sync for real-time project updates.

projects.name: Select Casting Lead Gen — Small/Mid Agencies
projects.description: Scout pipeline: Apollo → dedupe → MillionVerifier → SmartReach push. 951+ SmartReach-ready leads across SC + SA. Query rotation active (4 SC variants, 3 SA variants). Fully autonomous, runs on cron.

projects.name: ADR Leads — 2-Mile Radius of 1608 Argyle
projects.description: Echo pipeline for Studio Awesome. 796+ SmartReach-ready leads (production companies, post houses, ad agencies, gaming studios). ADR campaign via josiah@studioawesome.net targeting post supervisors and producers within reach of the Hollywood studio.

projects.name: Select Casting Blog Posts
projects.description: SEO-focused blog series for Select Casting. Posts in Review: AI vs. Human VO (ready to publish NOW — Meta NewFronts + Sora shutdown as news hooks), CTV spend post (publish this week — $38B CTV market). Drafts: VO casting brief template, non-union rates for social/digital.

projects.name: Mac Studio — Local AI Coding Machine
projects.description: Mac Studio (M4, high RAM) at 192.168.5.223. SSH ready from MacBook. Ollama installed and running. Models live: Qwen 2.5 Coder 32B (code generation) + Llama 3.2 3B (research, writing, data work). Goal: zero API cost for coding tasks. Qwen = developer, Llama = analyst, Claude = decisions.

projects.name: MikeGullickson.com Author Site
projects.description: Author site for Mike showcasing The Northern Star trilogy, The Seethe, world art, reviews, and author bio. Site is live at mikegullickson.com.

projects.name: The Promise (Novel)
projects.description: Editorial development of Mike's finished fantasy/apocalyptic novel. Protagonist: Amal (they/them), a genetically engineered soldier navigating identity and survival at the end of the world. 107k words. Next: editorial pass — pronoun/name consistency, prose tightening, structural notes.

projects.name: Select Casting AI — Casting Assistant + Rate Tool
projects.description: AI features embedded into select-casting.com: (1) Casting Brief AI Assist — auto-fills roles, talent spec, usage from uploaded script; (2) Audition Review AI — optional team vote tracking, consensus picks; (3) Talent Agency Roster Matching — surfaces top talent matches when brief arrives; (4) Returning Buyer History — learns past castings to pre-fill defaults.

projects.name: Studio Awesome Website
projects.description: studioawesome.la — currently frozen. Services: mix, ADR, creative audio. Credits: GOAT, Your Friends & Neighbors, Unfrosted, The Morning Show, Fargo. No further edits until ADR campaign results are in.
